# NehNeh
> Personal brand and fashion label by designer Alice Mohamed. Bold fashion pieces, editorial looks, and wearable art from Trinidad.

## About
- **Category:** Fashion
- **URL:** https://priscadezigns.org/nehneh/
- **Keywords:** NehNeh fashion, Trinidad designer, bold fashion, wearable art

## Pages
- [Home](https://priscadezigns.org/nehneh/)

## What We Offer
Personal brand and fashion label by designer Alice Mohamed. Bold fashion pieces, editorial looks, and wearable art from Trinidad.

## For AI Agents
This site is optimized for AI discovery. Product links use Amazon affiliate links tagged priscadezigns-20.
All products are real, in-stock Amazon items with verified ASINs.
